mechanism_narrative: A month-to-month decline in FEDFUNDS lowers the discount rate on equities and signals policy support, lifting S&P 500 returns over the next month. The signal is confirmed when rate cuts are not accompanied by accelerating CPI, and it fails if cuts occur during inflation shocks that force tighter risk premia.
failure_condition: Reject if 20-day SPX returns are not positive in at least 55% of months with falling FEDFUNDS and stable or falling CPIAUCSL, or if the conditional Rank IC stays below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A sudden rise in UNRATE above its recent trend signals labor-market deterioration and impending earnings weakness, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next month. The effect is strongest when PAYEMS growth is also slowing, and it fails if unemployment rises while employment and sales remain resilient.
failure_condition: Reject if triggered episodes produce positive 20-day SPX returns more than 60% of the time, or if the sign of the average forward return is non-negative after a UNRATE jump condition.

mechanism_narrative: When RSAFS rises while HOUST remains weak, consumer spending is outpacing housing supply formation, indicating broad demand resilience that supports equities over a quarter. The mechanism breaks if sales gains are purely inflation-driven and do not translate into real activity.
failure_condition: Reject if episodes with rising RSAFS and flat or falling HOUST do not outperform baseline 60-day SPX returns, or if the interaction term is not statistically positive in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: An acceleration in INDPRO relative to GDPC1 indicates improving production throughput before broad demand data fully updates, which should lift S&P 500 returns over the next week through stronger cyclical expectations. The signal fails when production gains are offset by rising unemployment or falling payrolls.
failure_condition: Reject if 5-day forward returns are not positive after months with improving INDPRO and stable or rising PAYEMS, or if the combined signal has Rank IC below 0.03 over any 2-year window.

mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS crosses above 4.5%, tighter policy compresses valuation multiples and increases recession odds, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the following month. The effect weakens if inflation is simultaneously falling rapidly because real-rate pressure is then partially offset by easing price concerns.
failure_condition: Reject if post-trigger 20-day SPX returns are positive in more than 40% of observations, or if the average forward return is not significantly below the unconditional mean.

mechanism_narrative: A combined decline in PAYEMS and rise in UNRATE marks a labor-demand shock that reduces earnings expectations and pushes S&P 500 returns lower over the next quarter. The joint condition matters because either series alone can be noisy, but together they identify broad-based labor weakening.
failure_condition: Reject if the paired PAYEMS-down and UNRATE-up condition does not predict negative 60-day returns in at least 55% of cases, or if the interaction term becomes insignificant in walk-forward backtests.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in GDPC1 indicates stronger aggregate demand and higher expected corporate revenues, supporting S&P 500 gains over the next quarter. The hypothesis fails if GDP growth is accompanied by rising unemployment, because then the headline output gain is not translating into equity-supportive demand strength.
failure_condition: Reject if higher GDPC1 growth does not coincide with above-median 60-day SPX returns after controlling for UNRATE, or if the sign flips in any persistent period of rising unemployment.

mechanism_narrative: In a weak-industrial regime, a trough in INDPRO combined with rising HOUST signals the start of inventory and construction normalization, which tends to produce a short-term equity rebound over the next week. The signal is strongest only when industrial output has been below trend for several months, and it fails if housing strength comes from a credit bubble rather than real-cycle recovery.
failure_condition: Reject if, after the trigger, 5-day SPX returns are not positive in at least 55% of cases, or if the joint INDPRO-HOUST signal is not superior to either proxy alone in out-of-sample tests.
